   "reasoning":"Honestly, I don't think throwing more money at students through scholarships will help much. It just spreads the little aid we have too thin. Meanwhile, our teachers are burning out and dropping like flies. We need to fix the root causes - underpaid, overburdened teachers and a toxic culture that punishes excellence.",
